report.summary: Day 57 standup v14: Full 6/6 rotation since v13. KEY DELTAS — Yield-bearing stablecoins guide built (775 lines, 3-tab, 6 protocols, $20B+ market), Karak+Fluid promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (405 slugs), both polished with dynamic OG + BackToTop + a11y, DeFi guides 405-milestone social campaign drafted, EOD QA pass clean. Git locks now ~30h stale. FOMC TODAY 2pm ET. Queue at 1 item. 65 agent reports today.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since v13 Standup
items: PUBLISHED_PAGES: 405 slugs (+3 vs v13's 402). Publish-v7 promoted Karak Network + Fluid Protocol guides. PUBLISH_QUEUE: 1 item remaining (/learn/yield-bearing-stablecoins — from build-2 this cycle).

New content this cycle (build-2): /learn/yield-bearing-stablecoins — 775-line guide with 3 interactive tabs, covering 6 protocols (Ethena sUSDe, Sky sUSDS, Ondo USDY, Usual USD0++, Mountain USDM, Frax sfrxUSD), $20B+ market. SEO metadata via layout.tsx, 6 internal links, Article JSON-LD. Queued in PUBLISH_QUEUE.

Design-v11 polished Karak + Fluid guides: OG images switched to dynamic /api/og endpoint (1200x630), BackToTop component added to both, calculator a11y (12px min font, ARIA labels, role=region, 44px touch targets, responsive grid).

Community-v10 drafted 405-milestone social campaign: 4 tweets (8 DeFi guides drop, Sui spotlight, cross-chain spotlight, BTC LSTs spotlight), Discord/Telegram update, Thu newsletter insert with 4 featured guides, week-in-review tweet. Social card SVG created (social-defi-guides-405-2026.svg).
EOD-v11 QA pass: 42 TS errors (2 files, non-critical), 104 orphan slugs, all 6 API routes healthy with proper caching, rate limiter still 0/6 on core routes.

Market context: BTC holding $75K+ (6-week high). ETF inflow streak Day 6+ ($962.8M). FOMC decision TODAY Mar 17 at 2pm ET — rate hold priced in, dot plot key signal. Pectra T-24 (Apr 10). Tax deadline T-29 (Apr 15).
Page coverage: 1,076 page.tsx files for 405 published slugs. 672 built-but-unpublished pages. All 6 API routes healthy. Zero Vercel build failures today.
GSC organic window: Day 18+ of 14-21 indexing window — first measurable organic clicks imminent from Jan/Feb content. 71 new pages published this week entering index.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over Since v13
items: FULL ROTATION COMPLETED (6/6) since v13 ✅ — build-2 + publish-v7 + design-v11 + community-v10 + eod-v11 all ran. Today total: 64 agent reports prior. v14 standup is report #65.

SHIPPED this cycle ✅ — Yield-bearing stablecoins guide (775 lines, 3 tabs, 6 protocols); Karak+Fluid promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (405 total); Karak+Fluid OG images fixed to dynamic /api/og; BackToTop added to both guides; calculator a11y polish; 405-milestone social campaign + social card SVG; EOD QA pass clean.

BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] git index.lock + HEAD.lock — NOW ~30 HOURS STALE (created Mar 16 ~11:17/13:06 CET). 405 slugs, 1,076 page.tsx files, 3 new guides with interactive calcs, all OG/a11y fixes — ALL uncommitted. FOMC is TODAY. This is the single highest-priority action.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Rate Limiter 0/6 core routes — 23rd consecutive standup flagging. FOMC TODAY will spike /api/prices and /api/trending simultaneously. Still 0/6 coverage.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] PUBLISH_QUEUE: 1 item (/learn/yield-bearing-stablecoins) — awaiting next publish cycle.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] 104 orphan slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES with no page.tsx — will 404 in production.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] 66+ ecosystem pages missing OG metadata (need server/client split).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P1] API fallback coverage: 2/6 routes only. 4 routes return HTTP 500 on upstream failure.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 [P2] 42 TS errors in 2 files (non-blocking). Vercel Pro trial ~7 days remaining.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — JEFE ACTION REQUIRED: Remove git locks NOW. Commands: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add -A → git commit -m 'Day 57: 405 pages, yield-bearing-stablecoins+Karak+Fluid guides, OG+a11y fixes' → git push. 30 hours of accumulated work is invisible to production. FOMC day is highest-traffic catalyst in 6 weeks.

PRIORITY 2 — Wire rate limiters to all 6 API routes before FOMC spike: Apply checkRateLimit() to /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields. Add fallback data to 4 missing routes. Unprotected endpoints under FOMC traffic load is a live production risk.

PRIORITY 3 — Promote yield-bearing-stablecoins from PUBLISH_QUEUE (→ 406 slugs) + continue OG metadata rollout on 66+ ecosystem pages + scaffold page.tsx for top-priority orphan slugs (104 total). Verify Vercel billing this week (trial expires ~Mar 25).

STRATEGIC NOTE — Content velocity remains peak: 3 guides this rotation (yield-bearing stablecoins, Karak, Fluid), 405 published pages, 1,076 total built. The constraint is purely deployment — a 2-minute terminal action unlocks 30+ hours of accumulated work for FOMC day, the biggest traffic catalyst since the Bitcoin ETF approval window. Every hour of delay reduces ROI on the entire content pipeline.
